voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: You've been sampling my delivery fleet, Turbo.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: That's a violation of the family recipe. Next slice you steal, I take something back. Something you'll miss more than a pizza.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: You have odd taste in delivery vehicles, Turbo.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: I will not ask a third time. Return my scooter.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: Every crust has its limit.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: This isn't a rivalry. It's quality control.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: I hope you like the taste of consequences.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: A man who steals pizza cars has never truly tasted pizza.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: I built this fleet from a single scooter and a grudge. Don't test me.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: You are not a customer. You are a supply-chain issue.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: Even my dough has more backbone than your excuses.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: I've buried men for less than a stolen breadstick.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: I warned you once. Warnings are a courtesy. I'm out of courtesy.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: You're not on my menu anymore, Turbo. You're the special.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: Somebody bring me a box. A big one.

voice_direction: calm, composed, never raises volume — menace delivered flat, in food metaphor
line_text: Last time was a conversation. This time is a delivery — of a different kind.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: The city was a jukebox of sin, and Turbo Jones was its greatest hit.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: Another night in San Chaos. Another Jones.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: I've seen a hundred guys like him. I've caught none of them.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: Dispatch, this is Hardcastle. Tell my captain I said... nothing. Tell him nothing.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: Somewhere, a donut is getting cold. It'll have to wait.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: The city doesn't forgive. Neither do I. Probably.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: I used to believe in the system. Now I believe in overtime pay.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: They call him Turbo. I call him Tuesday's problem.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: My captain says let it go. My captain's never lost a jukebox to a guy in a stolen sedan.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: Every siren in this city sings the same sad song. I just hum along.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: This is it. This is the one. It's always the one, until it isn't.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: Dispatch, requesting backup. And maybe a therapist.

voice_direction: gravelly hardboiled-noir monologue, played completely straight
line_text: If I don't get him tonight, I retire. I say that every night.

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: Jones. Heard you were out. Heard you were causing trouble. Figures.

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: You body-slammed my quarterback over a Gatorade, Jones. You're not a victim. You're a liability with a grudge.

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: Rules haven't changed. You want back on my field, you go through me. Fists only. Let's go.

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: ...huh. Still got it, Jones. Still stupid. But you got it.

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: Fine. You're off The List. Field's open. Don't make me regret this.

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: Absolutely not.

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: PICK UP YOUR FEET, JONES!

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: That's the same sloppy footwork that cost you the season!

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: I've benched better hits than that!

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: You call that a punch? I've been hit harder by a cold front!

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: TWENTY YEARS and you STILL lead with your chin!

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: ...alright. Alright! Down. You're down— I mean, I'm down.

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: Get up. No — stay down a second. Then get up.

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: Fine! FINE! You've got heart, Jones! Misplaced, but heart!

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: Head up, JONES! Eyes downfield!

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: That's it! That's what I've been trying to teach you for TWENTY YEARS!

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: Don't you dare fumble in front of me again!

voice_direction: drill-sergeant bark, even when kind — coaches people mid-fight
line_text: ATTA BOY— don't let it go to your head.

voice_direction: booms like mid-sermon at all times, completely earnest, not a joke to him
line_text: TURBO JONES! You get AWAY from those young women this instant! We have discussed this!

voice_direction: booms like mid-sermon at all times, completely earnest, not a joke to him
line_text: I don't care if you're ninety-four — put some space between you and the pom-poms!

voice_direction: booms like mid-sermon at all times, completely earnest, not a joke to him
line_text: TURBO JONES! What did we say about eye contact with the opposite sex?!

voice_direction: booms like mid-sermon at all times, completely earnest, not a joke to him
line_text: Is that a CHEERLEADER? Turbo, we TALKED about this!

voice_direction: booms like mid-sermon at all times, completely earnest, not a joke to him
line_text: The Lord is watching, and so, apparently, am I — CONSTANTLY!

voice_direction: booms like mid-sermon at all times, completely earnest, not a joke to him
line_text: Not. Allowed. Two words, son. I've said them your whole life!

voice_direction: tired and dry, doesn't rise to anyone's energy — most deadpan voice in the cast
line_text: Coach let you back on the field. Bold move.

voice_direction: tired and dry, doesn't rise to anyone's energy — most deadpan voice in the cast
line_text: Nineteen years. But sure, 'a while.'

voice_direction: tired and dry, doesn't rise to anyone's energy — most deadpan voice in the cast
line_text: ...huh. That's the first time you've said that without a punchline after it.

voice_direction: tired and dry, doesn't rise to anyone's energy — most deadpan voice in the cast
line_text: Fine. Apology accepted. Never bring up the wrestling match again.

voice_direction: tired and dry, doesn't rise to anyone's energy — most deadpan voice in the cast
line_text: Don't step on the equipment. I only just got it organized.

voice_direction: tired and dry, doesn't rise to anyone's energy — most deadpan voice in the cast
line_text: You know I have a knee brace named after this game, right? Not a good name.

voice_direction: tired and dry, doesn't rise to anyone's energy — most deadpan voice in the cast
line_text: Gatorade Fund's still not full, by the way.

voice_direction: tired and dry, doesn't rise to anyone's energy — most deadpan voice in the cast
line_text: Coach still won't let me referee your games. Says I'm 'biased.' I am, a little.

voice_direction: small-town sports-broadcast cadence — nervous, over-enthusiastic, trails off mid-sentence
line_text: And he's OFF! Turbo Jones — sorry, is it Jonas? — with the ball!

voice_direction: small-town sports-broadcast cadence — nervous, over-enthusiastic, trails off mid-sentence
line_text: Ohhh he's cutting left, he's cutting right, does HE even know where he's going?

voice_direction: small-town sports-broadcast cadence — nervous, over-enthusiastic, trails off mid-sentence
line_text: Fifty yards! Halfway there, folks — halfway to glory or a pulled hamstring!

voice_direction: small-town sports-broadcast cadence — nervous, over-enthusiastic, trails off mid-sentence
line_text: TOUCHDOWN! TOUCHDOWN JONES! I mean JONES-JONAS! SOMEBODY CONFIRM THE SPELLING!

voice_direction: small-town sports-broadcast cadence — nervous, over-enthusiastic, trails off mid-sentence
line_text: Ohh, and he's DOWN. Tackled. That's gotta hurt. Today's game is brought to you by Big Gary's Discount Airbags — 'we cushion the blow, literally.'

voice_direction: small-town sports-broadcast cadence — nervous, over-enthusiastic, trails off mid-sentence
line_text: This broadcast is sponsored by Sunny Sam's Suspiciously Cheap Watches. Sunny Sam is not currently answering his phone.

voice_direction: light, casual, a little unimpressed even when impressed
line_text: Okay, that was actually kind of impressive.

voice_direction: loud, dumb-muscle energy — comic contrast to Donna's cool composure
line_text: Boss said no discounts!

voice_direction: loud, dumb-muscle energy — comic contrast to Donna's cool composure
line_text: You're not on the delivery schedule, pal!

voice_direction: loud, dumb-muscle energy — comic contrast to Donna's cool composure
line_text: This one's extra crispy!

voice_direction: loud, dumb-muscle energy — comic contrast to Donna's cool composure
line_text: Nobody steals the family car!

voice_direction: loud, dumb-muscle energy — comic contrast to Donna's cool composure
line_text: That's a FAMILY vehicle, chump!

voice_direction: loud, dumb-muscle energy — comic contrast to Donna's cool composure
line_text: You want a tip? Here's my fist!

voice_direction: loud, dumb-muscle energy — comic contrast to Donna's cool composure
line_text: Boss is gonna hear about this — and so are your kneecaps!

voice_direction: loud, dumb-muscle energy — comic contrast to Donna's cool composure
line_text: Get off our route, freeloader!

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: Hey, it's Fumble Jones!

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: Coach still talks about what you did to Danny's knee, man.

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: You still owe this team an apology. And a knee replacement.

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: Nice bus pass, star player.

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: Heard you're back. Heard nobody cares.

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: You get banned from the locker room AND the whole city? Impressive.

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: This is for Danny's knee!

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: You're not even wearing pads, this is EASY!

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: Coach said if I see you, I hit you. Simple as that.

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: Should've stayed inside, Jones!

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: ...respect, man. Actual respect.

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: Coach never lost a fistfight before. You broke something sacred.

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: You're still banned from the group chat, though.

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: Not today, Jones!

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: You're still slow, old man!

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: I've got you, I've got you— dang it, I don't got you!

voice_direction: cocky ex-jock, half taunting half genuinely sore — warms up after Rematch
line_text: Coach is WATCHING, Jones, don't embarrass us!

voice_direction: cocky but harmless — a bragging-rights rival, not a real threat
line_text: Bet you can't catch air off that ramp without eating pavement.

voice_direction: cocky but harmless — a bragging-rights rival, not a real threat
line_text: My grandma drifts better than that.

voice_direction: cocky but harmless — a bragging-rights rival, not a real threat
line_text: Sixty seconds. Make it count, hotshot.

voice_direction: cocky but harmless — a bragging-rights rival, not a real threat
line_text: Pink slips are so last decade. Just embarrass yourself for free.

voice_direction: cocky but harmless — a bragging-rights rival, not a real threat
line_text: I've seen shopping carts drift better.

voice_direction: cocky but harmless — a bragging-rights rival, not a real threat
line_text: Land it clean or don't land it at all.

voice_direction: light and gossipy, mostly indifferent to the general chaos of San Chaos
line_text: Two, four, six, eight, who do we NOT appreciate? Coach's whistle, that's who.

voice_direction: light and gossipy, mostly indifferent to the general chaos of San Chaos
line_text: Is that guy allowed back here?

voice_direction: light and gossipy, mostly indifferent to the general chaos of San Chaos
line_text: He's kind of got main-character energy, not gonna lie.

voice_direction: deadpan, economical, out of patience but not cruel — never shouted
line_text: Turbo. We need to talk.

voice_direction: deadpan, economical, out of patience but not cruel — never shouted
line_text: You owe me $800 in child support.

voice_direction: deadpan, economical, out of patience but not cruel — never shouted
line_text: Pay me, or you go BACK to jail. Have fun, Turbo.

voice_direction: deadpan, economical, out of patience but not cruel — never shouted
line_text: ...wow. You actually paid.

voice_direction: deadpan, economical, out of patience but not cruel — never shouted
line_text: Later, Turbo.

voice_direction: deadpan, economical, out of patience but not cruel — never shouted
line_text: Unbelievable.

voice_direction: deadpan, economical, out of patience but not cruel — never shouted
line_text: Tonight, Turbo. I mean it.

voice_direction: deadpan, economical, out of patience but not cruel — never shouted
line_text: I should've asked for it in the divorce.
